misconduct.title: Misconduct News
misconduct.description: Collected news reports of administrative misconduct.

title.description: The title of the news report.

location.description: The location where the misconduct occurred.

category.description: The category of the misconduct (e.g., corruption, negligence).

summary.description: A brief summary of the news report.

url.description: The URL to the original news source.

source.description: The name of the news source.

collectedAt.description: When the news was collected by AI.

inaction.title: Administrative Inaction
inaction.description: Data regarding unexecuted budgets or delayed public projects.

project.description: The name of the project or budget item.

budget.description: The amount of unexecuted budget in JPY.

delay.description: The duration of the delay (e.g., '3 years').

impact.description: The social or economic impact of the inaction.

aiColumn.title: AI Column/Analysis
aiColumn.description: AI-generated analysis and columns based on misconduct and inaction data.

content.description: The full content of the analysis.

integrityIndex.description: A calculated index of civic integrity.

relatedDataIds.description: IDs of misconduct or inaction records used in this analysis.

/aiColumns.description: Collection of AI-generated columns and analyses.
